overview: Eminence provides personalized hormone therapy (menopause and testosterone replacement) and weight loss services, including GLP-1 programs and non-medicated options, with comprehensive metabolic and hormonal testing.
highlights: GLP-1 weight loss program with tirzepatide
DEXA scanning and VO2 Max testing
Advanced metabolic and hormone biomarker testing
targetAudience: Women navigating menopause, men seeking testosterone optimization, and anyone pursuing personalized weight loss and metabolic health.
